modules.title: Introduction to Java
topics: History and key features of Java (simple, secure, platform-independent)
JDK, JRE, JVM: roles and architecture
Setting up the development environment (JDK, IntelliJ IDEA)
handsOn: Install JDK and configure IntelliJ IDEA
Compile and run "Hello, World!" from terminal and IDE
modules.learningOutcome: Understand Java's platform model, JVM architecture, set up the development environment, and write your first programs.

modules.title: Data Types, Variables & Operators
topics: Integer types: byte, short, int, long
Wrapper classes: Integer, Double, Character, Boolean, and autoboxing
handsOn: Programs using primitive types and wrapper classes
Type conversion and casting examples
modules.learningOutcome: Work with Java's type system including primitives, wrapper classes, and type conversions.

modules.title: Control Flow
topics: for loop and enhanced for-each loop
handsOn: Pattern printing and number series programs
Switch-expression-based menu-driven programs
modules.learningOutcome: Control program flow using Java's conditional statements, loop constructs, and the modern switch expression.

modules.title: OOP: Classes & Objects
topics: Class definition: fields, methods, and constructors
Object creation and the new keyword
handsOn: Design a Student class with full OOP features (constructors, getters, setters)
Static counter to track total object creations
modules.learningOutcome: Design and implement Java classes and objects following core OOP principles.

modules.title: Inheritance & Polymorphism
topics: The super keyword: calling parent constructors and methods
handsOn: Build an Animal hierarchy: Animal, Dog, Cat, Bird classes
Demonstrate dynamic method dispatch with Animal references
modules.learningOutcome: Apply inheritance and polymorphism to build extensible and reusable Java class hierarchies.

modules.title: Interfaces & Abstraction
topics: Interface definition with the interface keyword
Default methods and static methods in interfaces (Java 8+)
handsOn: Implement Printable and Sortable interfaces in a data class
Build a payment plugin system using interfaces
modules.learningOutcome: Design flexible and loosely coupled Java systems using interfaces and abstract classes.

modules.title: Packages & Exception Handling
handsOn: Implement robust exception handling in a banking application
try-with-resources for automatic file resource cleanup
modules.learningOutcome: Organize Java code into packages and handle errors using Java's comprehensive exception mechanism.

modules.title: Java Collections Framework
handsOn: Word frequency counter using HashMap
Student grade sorter using TreeMap
modules.learningOutcome: Select and use appropriate Java collections for efficient data storage, retrieval, and manipulation.

modules.title: Strings & Text Processing
topics: Key String methods: substring, split, indexOf, replace, trim, contains
StringBuilder and StringBuffer for mutable strings
handsOn: String parsing and manipulation programs (anagram, palindrome)
Regex-based email and phone number validator
modules.learningOutcome: Manipulate text efficiently using String, StringBuilder, and regular expressions in Java.

modules.title: File I/O & Serialization
topics: java.io package: FileReader, FileWriter, BufferedReader, BufferedWriter
File class operations: create, delete, list directories
java.nio.file: Path, Paths, Files utility class
handsOn: Read and write student records to a text file using BufferedWriter
Serialize and deserialize a Java object to/from file
modules.learningOutcome: Implement file operations and object persistence in Java using both classic IO and NIO.2 APIs.

modules.title: Generics
topics: Type parameters and bounded type parameters (extends, super)
Wildcard types: ? (unbounded), ? extends T, ? super T
handsOn: Build a generic Pair<K, V> class and generic Stack<T>
modules.learningOutcome: Write type-safe, reusable Java components using generics and wildcard types.

modules.title: Lambda Expressions & Stream API
topics: Functional interfaces: Predicate, Function, Consumer, Supplier, Comparator
Lambda expression syntax and method references (::)
Stream API pipeline: source → intermediate → terminal
Intermediate operations: filter(), map(), sorted(), distinct(), flatMap()
handsOn: Process employee dataset using Stream API (filter, map, collect)
Lambda-based custom sorting with Comparator
modules.learningOutcome: Write concise, functional-style Java code using lambda expressions and the Stream API.

modules.title: Multithreading Basics
topics: Java thread lifecycle: New, Runnable, Running, Blocked, Dead
Creating threads: extending Thread class and implementing Runnable
Thread methods: start(), sleep(), join(), yield(), interrupt()
handsOn: Producer-consumer pattern using threads
modules.learningOutcome: Create and manage basic multithreaded Java programs with proper synchronization.

modules.title: Advanced Concurrency
topics: ExecutorService and thread pool types: newFixedThreadPool, newCachedThreadPool
Future<T> and Callable<T> for async task results
handsOn: Concurrent web scraper using CompletableFuture
modules.learningOutcome: Write high-performance concurrent Java applications using advanced concurrency primitives.

modules.title: Java Networking
topics: Socket programming: ServerSocket and Socket classes
Sending GET and POST requests with HttpRequest
URL and URLConnection for basic HTTP calls
handsOn: Build a TCP chat server and client using Java sockets
modules.learningOutcome: Build networked Java applications using socket programming and the modern HTTP client API.

modules.title: Design Patterns in Java
topics: Singleton (thread-safe), Factory Method, Abstract Factory, Builder, Prototype
Observer, Strategy, Template Method, Iterator, Command
SOLID principles applied to Java class design
handsOn: Implement a notification system using Observer pattern
modules.learningOutcome: Apply classic design patterns and SOLID principles to build maintainable Java applications.

modules.title: JVM Internals & Performance Tuning
topics: JVM architecture: class loader subsystem, JIT compiler, execution engine
Java memory model: heap (young/old gen), stack, metaspace, code cache
handsOn: Profile a Java application with VisualVM and tune GC settings
modules.learningOutcome: Understand JVM internals and tune Java applications for optimal memory and performance.

modules.title: Java Modules & Build Tools
topics: Java Platform Module System (JPMS) introduced in Java 9
handsOn: Build a multi-module Maven project with dependency management
modules.learningOutcome: Structure, build, and manage Java projects using Maven, Gradle, and the Java Module System.

modules.title: Introduction to Spring Framework
topics: Spring Core: Inversion of Control (IoC) container
Spring Boot: auto-configuration and starter dependencies
Building a REST API with Spring Boot (@RestController, @GetMapping)
handsOn: Build a Student CRUD REST API with Spring Boot and H2 database
modules.learningOutcome: Build production-ready REST APIs using the Spring Boot framework and Spring Data JPA.

modules.title: Testing in Java
handsOn: Write unit and integration tests for the Spring Boot REST API
modules.learningOutcome: Ensure Java code quality through unit testing, mocking, and TDD using JUnit 5 and Mockito.
